signals.signal_name: Follow Up Boss active lead searches

signals.summary: Consistent high scoring leads (scores ~80-100) in Follow Up Boss platform actively searching and sourcing cash offers, with repeated website visits and urgent intent indicators.
signals.why_it_matters: These leads represent imminent buyer and seller transactions, indicating a strong current real estate demand requiring prompt engagement to secure deals.
affected_opportunities: Conversion of active buyers and sellers
future_questions_people_will_ask: How to source cash offers quickly?
What are urgent steps to buying/selling a home?
Which agents respond fastest?
signals.time_horizon: Immediate to short term (days to weeks)

signals.summary: Detected 52 classified BSW healthcare hiring signals. Role mix: Attending Physician / Specialist: 37; Surgeon / High-Income Specialist: 4; Healthcare Recruiting Signal: 9; Advanced Practice Provider: 1; Healthcare Executive / Leadership: 1. Estimated relocations: 32.3. Estimated housing demand range: $16,845,000 - $40,762,500. Examples: Physicians; Esther H., Cardiothoracic Surgeon; In-house Recruiters; Featured Recruiters; Senior Physician Recruiter; APP Recruiter; Recruiters; Additional Recruiters
signals.why_it_matters: BSW healthcare hiring is a leading indicator of future relocation demand. Physicians, specialists, healthcare executives, advanced practice providers, and clinical staff create housing demand before they begin searching for a Realtor.

signals.signal_name: Temple Growth / Economic Development Activity Detected
signals.source: Temple EDC / City of Temple Growth Sources
signals.summary: Detected 58 Temple growth and economic-development signals. Data center mentions: 5. Investment mentions: 14. Acreage/land mentions: 3. Jobs/employment mentions: 5. Industrial/distribution/manufacturing mentions: 14. Examples: Temple Economic Development Corporation | Temple TX; Austin’s Industrial Gateway; Temple is on the cusp of significant growth and economic development – in everything from population to quality of life amenities to corporate investment. Check out our latest stats.; 16.5% Increase in Jobs; $3.5B+ Private Investment; 2,000 Shovel-Ready Acres Available; Learn about our industry assets and access the data, sites and information needed to make your move to Temple.; Properties in Temple span across industrial and commercial business needs and everything in between.
signals.why_it_matters: Temple economic-development activity is a leading indicator of future housing demand. Major employers, industrial projects, data centers, land purchases, and infrastructure investment can create future buyers, sellers, investors, builders, renters, and relocation clients.
future_questions_people_will_ask: What is being built in Temple?
Will this development affect home values?
Should I buy before prices rise?
Which neighborhoods will benefit from growth?
Is East or South Temple becoming a growth corridor?
Should investors buy near new development?
Will data centers affect Temple real estate?
